A prominent figure in disaster risk management, Ondine Torras has shaped her career with the guidance of her doctoral advisor, Evan Vermeer. Her impactful research has been published in the Copperwing Scriptorium, where her findings are shared with a broader audience. Funding for her initiatives has primarily come from the Yearling Roots Circle, highlighting the collaborative nature of her projects. Ondine also holds the Zealous Harmony Composer certification, a testament to her diversified skill set and dedication to the field.
